mapper.sql: bid, bname, author, price, currPrice, discount, press, publishtime, edition, pageNum, wordNum, printtime, booksize, paper, cid, image_w, image_b, shunxu
mapper.insert: insert into book (bid, bname, author, price, currPrice, discount, press, publishtime, edition, pageNum, wordNum, printtime, booksize, paper, cid, image_w, image_b, shunxu) values (#{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{currprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{press,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{publishtime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{edition,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{pagenum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{wordnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{printtime,jdbcType=DATE}, #{booksize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{paper,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageW,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{imageB,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shunxu,jdbcType=INTEGER})

insert into book
bid,
bname,
author,
price,
currPrice,
discount,
press,
publishtime,
edition,
pageNum,
wordNum,
printtime,
booksize,
paper,
cid,
image_w,
image_b,
shunxu,
#{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{bname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{currprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
#{press,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{publishtime,jdbcType=DATE},
#{edition,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{pagenum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{wordnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
#{printtime,jdbcType=DATE},
#{booksize,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{paper,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{imageW,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{imageB,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{shunxu,jdbcType=INTEGER},
mapper.update:
update book
bname = #{bname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
author = #{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
currPrice = #{currprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
discount = #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
press = #{press,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
publishtime = #{publishtime,jdbcType=DATE},
edition = #{edition,jdbcType=INTEGER},
pageNum = #{pagenum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
wordNum = #{wordnum,jdbcType=INTEGER},
printtime = #{printtime,jdbcType=DATE},
booksize = #{booksize,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
paper = #{paper,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_w = #{imageW,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
image_b = #{imageB,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
shunxu = #{shunxu,jdbcType=INTEGER},
where bid = #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update book set bname = #{bname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, author = #{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, price = #{price,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, currPrice = #{currprice,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, discount = #{discount,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, press = #{press,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, publishtime = #{publishtime,jdbcType=DATE}, edition = #{edition,jdbcType=INTEGER}, pageNum = #{pagenum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, wordNum = #{wordnum,jdbcType=INTEGER}, printtime = #{printtime,jdbcType=DATE}, booksize = #{booksize,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, paper = #{paper,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_w = #{imageW,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, image_b = #{imageB,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, shunxu = #{shunxu,jdbcType=INTEGER} where bid = #{bid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.select:
select
from book where cid = #{cid,jdbcType=VARCHAR} order by shunxu desc, bid asc

select
from book where bname like concat('%',#{bname,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') order by shunxu desc

select
from book where author like concat('%',#{author,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') order by shunxu desc

select
from book where press like concat('%',#{press,jdbcType=VARCHAR},'%') order by shunxu desc

select
from book order by shunxu desc, bid desc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}

select
from book order by shunxu desc, bid asc limit #{limit,jdbcType=INTEGER}
